meta.title: U.S. Marines Are Getting A New Exoskeleton & Other Top Stories From Sandboxx News
meta.description:
Subscribe and 🔔 to Sandboxx YouTube so you never miss a video. 

It's Saturday, 1 August 2020.  Stay up to date on what's happening in the military with Sandboxx News. 

Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

America's secret missile 👉 https://bit.ly/3hVGxwF

North Korea's generals don't seem to know how pistols work
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/39KKxgR

Dogfighting at 9gs
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3k36o83

Marines getting new robotic exoskeleton
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/31bqvbt

How to physically prepare for Ranger School
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3gn7t8u

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

0:00 Intro
0:34 America's Secret Missile 
1:38 North Korea's Generals Don't Seem to Know How Pistols Work
2:33 Dogfighting at 9GS
3:12 Marines getting Exoskeleton
4:20 Preparing for Ranger School
